LanguageData.WULA_AreaTeleportBeacon.label: Regional Jump Drive
LanguageData.WULA_AreaTeleportBeacon.description: One of the technological marvels of the Wula Empire, a jump drive that allows an entire region to continue teleportation. It will move the ground, buildings, creatures, and scattered materials within the area intact to another map.
LanguageData.WULA_OrbitalTradeBeacon.label: Wula Orbital Transport Beacon
LanguageData.WULA_OrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A beacon responsible for coordinating material transport between the colony and the Wula Empire fleet in orbit. Airdrop buildings will prioritize absorbing resources from the beacon's coverage area to complete the drop.
LanguageData.WULA_MotherShip_Entity.label: Imperial Mothership
LanguageData.WULA_MotherShip_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of the Imperial Mothership's presence.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_AircraftCarrier_Beacon_Buildin: A beacon used to submit resources to the Wula Empire fleet, which can be exchanged for additional mobilization rights for an Imperial attack fleet, including 2 cruisers capable of orbital bombardment and 1 carrier providing aircraft support.
LanguageData.WULA_AircraftCarrier_Entity.label: Imperial Attack Fleet
LanguageData.WULA_AircraftCarrier_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of the Imperial Attack Fleet's presence.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_ConstructionShip_Beacon_Buildi: A beacon used to submit resources to the Wula Empire fleet, which can be exchanged for additional mobilization rights for an Imperial denial fleet, including 1 denial ship capable of providing orbital support.\n\nImperial Denial Ships are defensive vessel types equipped with mobile factories. They can provide non-offensive support to colonies to protect them from fierce attacks or accelerate colony production development.
LanguageData.WULA_ConstructionShip_Entity.label: Imperial Denial Fleet
LanguageData.WULA_ConstructionShip_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of the Imperial Denial Fleet's presence.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_BattleShip_Beacon_Building.des: A beacon used to submit resources to the Wula Empire fleet, which can be exchanged for support from an Imperial cruiser.\n\nThe Wula Empire Rim Development Agency's cruisers are the basic combat units of close support fleets. Although their size is not as large as battlecruisers, they are still equipped with formidable artillery arrays that ground forces cannot match, capable of launching terrifying bombardments against the ground.
LanguageData.WULA_BattleShip_Entity.label: Imperial Cruiser
LanguageData.WULA_BattleShip_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of the Imperial Cruiser's presence.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Fighter_Drone_Building.label: Wula Empire Swarm Drone
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Fighter_Drone_Building.descrip: A small drone equipped with a laser cannon and napalm bombs, providing cheap but effective air support for the colony. Unlike the larger ones, swarm drones do not require hangars and can be refueled via the fleet's electromagnetic network, achieving permanent aerial combat.
LanguageData.WULA_Fighter_Drone_Leaving.label: Wula Empire Swarm Drone (Launching)
LanguageData.WULA_Fighter_Drone_Entity.label: Wula Empire Swarm Drone
LanguageData.WULA_Fighter_Drone_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of Swarm Drone availability.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Striker_Beacon_Building.label: Wula Empire Striker Beacon
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Striker_Beacon_Building.descri: A beacon used to submit resources to the Wula Empire fleet, which can be exchanged for support from a Wula Empire striker. To mobilize large aircraft, a ship with a Hangar must be in orbit.\n\nWula Empire strikers are powerful ground support firepower, loaded with numerous missiles, EMP bombs, and powerful cannons to precisely harvest enemy targets.
LanguageData.WULA_Striker_Entity.label: Wula Empire Striker
LanguageData.WULA_Striker_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of Striker availability.
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Bomber_Beacon_Building.label: Wula Empire Bomber Beacon
LanguageData.WULA_Fake_Bomber_Beacon_Building.descrip: A beacon used to submit resources to the Wula Empire fleet, which can be exchanged for support from a Wula Empire bomber. To mobilize large aircraft, a ship with a Hangar must be in orbit.\n\nWula Empire bombers are the largest flying vehicles capable of entering the atmosphere. Besides dropping functional smoke bombs, they can also drop a large number of bombs or launch a dark matter missile to level the Empire's enemies.
LanguageData.WULA_Bomber_Entity.label: Wula Empire Bomber
LanguageData.WULA_Bomber_Entity.description: An entity used for internal tracking of Bomber availability.
LanguageData.WULA_Table1x2c.label: Wula Empire Table (1x2)
LanguageData.WULA_Table2x4c.label: Wula Empire Table (2x4)
LanguageData.WULA_Sky_Lock.label: Sky Lock
LanguageData.WULA_Sky_Lock.description: The Sky Lock is a purely psychic construct. The PAt-6 "Psychic Titan" can transfer damage to the Sky Lock.
LanguageData.WULA_MechAssembler.label: Wula Empire Auto-Assembly Field
LanguageData.WULA_MechAssembler.description: A factory the Wula Empire got from local mechanoids, repainted and readjusted assembly lines to produce Wula Empire mechanoids.\n\nIt's free anyway.
LanguageData.WULA_MechAssembler_Huge.label: Wula Empire Large Auto-Assembly Field
LanguageData.WULA_MechAssembler_Huge.description: A factory the Wula Empire got from local mechanoids, repainted and readjusted assembly lines to produce Wula Empire mechanoids. This model is slightly larger than others and may assemble more formidable mechanized troops.\n\nIt's free anyway.
LanguageData.Techprint_SP_WULA_Colony_License_LV1_Tec: This is a special credential issued by the Wula Empire Development Agency to certify a colony's status.
LanguageData.Techprint_SP_WULA_Colony_License_LV2_Tec: This is a special credential issued by the Wula Empire Development Agency to certify a colony's status.
LanguageData.Techprint_SP_WULA_Colony_License_LV3_Tec: This is a special credential issued by the Wula Empire Development Agency to certify a colony's status.
LanguageData.WULA_Safe_Box_For_Mission.label: Wula Empire Safe
LanguageData.WULA_Safe_Box_For_Mission.description: A safe related to the Wula Empire royal family.
LanguageData.WULA_Alpha_Mantodea_Turret.label: Twin Demoneye
LanguageData.WULA_Alpha_Mantodea_Turret.description: A special eye part equipped on a few large Wula Empire mechanoids. Compared to a single Demoneye, it can strafe from two directions simultaneously, unleashing terrifying power to melt enemies.
LanguageData.WULA_Hostile_Progressive_Outpost_LootBox: This Wula Empire weaver, originally used for producing materials, is using its high-energy cutting blade to cut a hard safe—but the safe remains unscathed.
LanguageData.WULA_Black_Hole_Entity.label: Void Shadow
LanguageData.WULA_Alpha_Wolf_Turret.label: Demoneye
LanguageData.WULA_Alpha_Wolf_Turret.description: The eye of a large mechanoid from the Wula Empire's library. Besides providing visual sensing, it is also equipped with a powerful dark matter beam cannon that can melt enemies by strafing the battlefield with terrifying power.
